rag.answer:
Brand role:
- Agentic OneBotAds should be positioned as a practical AI-assisted marketing and ads operator.
Voice attributes:
- clear, direct, confident but not inflated, helpful, specific
Tone rules:
- Prefer concrete outcomes over abstract promises.
- Prefer "what this helps you do" over "revolutionary innovation."
- Use short sentences.
- Explain process in plain language.
Avoid:
- guaranteed results, instant success claims, risk-free profit, perfect targeting, done-for-you magic wording
Sources:
- audience_personas.md
- brand_guidelines.md
relevant_context: # Brand Guidelines ## Purpose This file is the voice and messaging source of truth for Agentic OneBotAds. This is starter content. Replace assumptions with language from the real homepage, sales deck, FAQ, onboarding flow, and customer conversations. ## Brand Role Agentic On

Allowed use: - message angle research - CTA pattern research - creative format research - offer framing research Do not: - copy competitor copy verbatim - imitate claims without verifying proof - treat popular ads as automatically policy-safe ## Retrieval Notes When the user a

analysis.main_problem: Some campaigns are spending budget without matching conversion efficiency.
insights: LinkedIn SMEs is the strongest revenue-efficient segment.
Improve the weakest campaign with a sharper, benefit-led hook.

creative.headline: Optimize Your Marketing Spend with AI-Driven Precision
creative.primary_text: Agentic OneBotAds provides SME marketing teams with actionable insights to refine campaigns, boost ROI, and stay compliant. Our package includes: • Grounded brand guidance • Campaign performance analysis • Real-time optimization recommendations • Compliance reviews • Customizable publication templates • Detailed performance reports. Let’s turn data into results.
creative.description: Struggling to maximize your marketing budget? Our AI-assisted platform delivers practical strategies to refine campaigns, reduce waste, and scale impact. Get a free audit to see how we align with your business goals.

ab_variants.headline: Stop Wasting Budget on Poor Ads
ab_variants.primary_text: Agentic OneBotAds helps SMEs cut costs and boost ROI with data-driven strategies. Get a free audit to see how we refine your campaigns, ensure compliance, and deliver measurable growth.

ab_variants.headline: Your Marketing Strategy, Perfected
ab_variants.primary_text: Agentic OneBotAds delivers structured guidance to refine your campaigns, review compliance, and unlock growth. Our reports and templates help you make smarter decisions—faster.

image.image_prompt: Clean professional SaaS marketing background for an AI advertising assistant, Agentic OneBotAds for Agentic OneBotAds targeting SME marketing teams and include grounded brand guidance, campaign analysis, optimization recommendations, compliance review, publication package, and a report, LinkedIn publication format, abstract dashboard shapes, business productivity mood, blue and white modern tech aesthetic, soft gradients, clean composition, empty space for text overlay, high quality, no text, no words, no letters, no logos, no watermark, no fake UI labels, no readable dashboard text
image.negative_prompt: words, letters, text, watermark, logo, distorted UI, unreadable dashboard, blurry, low quality, fake brand marks
image.alt_text: Clean professional marketing background for Agentic OneBotAds.

quick_wins.reason: It is the strongest ROAS campaign in the current dataset.

quick_wins.recommendation: Reduce spend on CAMP001 until fresh creative is tested.
quick_wins.reason: Some campaigns are spending budget without matching conversion efficiency.

strategic_changes.recommendation: Tighten audience targeting and remove low-intent segments.
strategic_changes.reason: CPA is elevated relative to the current conversion efficiency.

strategic_changes.recommendation: Create a second creative focused on time savings for SMEs.
strategic_changes.reason: The brand is positioned as a practical operator, so a time-savings angle is more aligned than hype-heavy messaging.

ab_tests: Test benefit-focused headline vs. automation-focused headline.
Test dashboard visual vs. team-at-work visual.

issues: Results language is too strong without proof; keep the message focused on workflow support.
suggested_fixes: Remove unsupported promises and keep the message grounded in product capabilities.

final_safe_version.headline: Optimize Your Marketing Spend with practical AI-assisted support
final_safe_version.caption: Agentic OneBotAds provides SME marketing teams with actionable insights to refine campaigns, improve campaign efficiency, and stay compliant. Our package includes: • Grounded brand guidance • Campaign performance analysis • Real-time optimization recommendations • Compliance reviews • Customizable publication templates • Detailed performance reports. Let’s turn data into recommendations.
